title: rubus niveus var. pauciflorus
intro: Rubus niveus var. pauciflorus is a variant of the white-fruited raspberry species, native to tropical Asia, characterized by its white flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus niveus var. pauciflorus include its ability to regulate blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
